title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security. After clicking reset, they must verify their email and create a new password.

title: Account Creation
content: Users can create an account by clicking the Sign Up button on the homepage and filling in their email, password, and profile details.

title: Update Email
content: Users can update their email address from Profile Settings under Account Information.

title: Delete Account
content: Users can permanently delete their account from Settings > Privacy > Delete Account.

title: Enable Two Factor Authentication
content: Two-factor authentication can be enabled from Security Settings to improve account safety.

title: Profile Update
content: Users can update their profile details from the profile settings page.

title: Contact Support
content: Users can contact support through the Help Center or email support@company.com.

title: Password Requirements
content: Passwords must be at least 8 characters long and contain a number and special character.

title: Assistant Name
content: The assistant's name is Luna Assistant. It is designed to answer questions using the provided knowledge base documents.

title: Login Issues
content: If users cannot log in to their account, they should first check their email and password. If the issue continues, they can reset their password or contact support.

title: Account Security Tips
content: Users should enable two-factor authentication, use strong passwords, and avoid sharing login credentials to keep their accounts secure.
